---
lang: de
params:
  ReferenceDataFile: NULL
  reportingPeriodFrom: NULL
  reportingPeriodTo: NULL
  birthWeightFrom: NULL
  birthWeightTo: NULL
  gestationWeeksFrom: NULL
  gestationWeeksTo: NULL
  reportingCountries: NULL
  hospitalFilter: NULL
  testUnitFilter: true
  defaultPatientFilter: true
  validationExceptionFile: NULL
  token: NULL
---

```{r}
#| label: Make sure the locale is initialised correctly
Sys.setenv(LC_ALL = "de_DE.UTF-8")
```

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _header.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_introduction.Rmd")
```

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_patient_population.Rmd")
```

{{< include figures/_fig-bw.qmd >}}
